java.util.concurrent/CompletableFuture<T.name: obtrudeException

java.util.concurrent/LinkedBlockingQueue.name: offer
signatures: public boolean offer(E e, long timeout, TimeUnit unit)
java.util.concurrent/LinkedBlockingQueue.description:
Inserts the specified element at the tail of this queue if it is
possible to do so immediately without exceeding the queue's capacity,
returningtrueupon success andfalseif this queue
is full.

java.util.concurrent/SubmissionPublisher.name: offer
signatures: public int offer(T item, long timeout, TimeUnit unit, BiPredicate<Flow.Subscriber<? super T>, ? super T> onDrop)
public int offer(T item, BiPredicate<Flow.Subscriber<? super T>, ? super T> onDrop)
java.util.concurrent/SubmissionPublisher.description:
Publishes the given item, if possible, to each current subscriber
by asynchronously invoking itsonNextmethod, blocking while
resources for any subscription are unavailable, up to the
specified timeout or until the caller thread is interrupted, at
which point the given handler (if non-null) is invoked, and if it
returns true, retried once.
